## Meeting Purpose

[Deep dive into GrowthX's performance and impact on WebStacks' content strategy and business growth](https://fathom.video/share/A6QFVpoxFzKg-6bd-H6LZsJRrPsopUfB?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [WebStacks shifted focus to upmarket clients, expanding brand positioning for enterprise accounts](https://fathom.video/share/A6QFVpoxFzKg-6bd-H6LZsJRrPsopUfB?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Content strategy evolved from surface-level AI-driven content to unique, WebStacks-specific perspective](https://fathom.video/share/A6QFVpoxFzKg-6bd-H6LZsJRrPsopUfB?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)
  - [Multi-faceted measurement approach: impressions → engagement → conversions → pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/A6QFVpoxFzKg-6bd-H6LZsJRrPsopUfB?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
  - [AI significantly impacting lead generation and differentiating WebStacks in the market](https://fathom.video/share/A6QFVpoxFzKg-6bd-H6LZsJRrPsopUfB?tab=summary&timestamp=1445.0)

## Topics

### WebStacks Business Evolution

  - [Focused on pitching upmarket clients since August](https://fathom.video/share/A6QFVpoxFzKg-6bd-H6LZsJRrPsopUfB?tab=summary&timestamp=177.0)
  - [Launched new website at start of year](https://fathom.video/share/A6QFVpoxFzKg-6bd-H6LZsJRrPsopUfB?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
  - [Expanded brand positioning for enterprise and higher mid-market accounts](https://fathom.video/share/A6QFVpoxFzKg-6bd-H6LZsJRrPsopUfB?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [Introduced WebSnacks for small mid-market companies](https://fathom.video/share/A6QFVpoxFzKg-6bd-H6LZsJRrPsopUfB?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
  - [Integrated web strategy as a service offering](https://fathom.video/share/A6QFVpoxFzKg-6bd-H6LZsJRrPsopUfB?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Emphasized thought leadership in the composable web space](https://fathom.video/share/A6QFVpoxFzKg-6bd-H6LZsJRrPsopUfB?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)

### Content Strategy Transformation

  - [Initial 3 months: Surface-level, AI-driven content based on high-volume keywords](https://fathom.video/share/A6QFVpoxFzKg-6bd-H6LZsJRrPsopUfB?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)
  - [Shift in strategy: Incorporating WebStacks' unique perspective and expertise](https://fathom.video/share/A6QFVpoxFzKg-6bd-H6LZsJRrPsopUfB?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)
  - [Key improvements:](https://fathom.video/share/A6QFVpoxFzKg-6bd-H6LZsJRrPsopUfB?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
      - [Adding complementary resources (Ada, Kyle, Jacob)](https://fathom.video/share/A6QFVpoxFzKg-6bd-H6LZsJRrPsopUfB?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
      - [Utilizing Gong call recordings and team insights](https://fathom.video/share/A6QFVpoxFzKg-6bd-H6LZsJRrPsopUfB?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
      - [Focusing on both high-volume and high-intent keywords](https://fathom.video/share/A6QFVpoxFzKg-6bd-H6LZsJRrPsopUfB?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)
  - [Results: Improved content quality and relevance, leading to better performance](https://fathom.video/share/A6QFVpoxFzKg-6bd-H6LZsJRrPsopUfB?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Performance Measurement Evolution

  - [Initial focus: Impressions and eyeballs on content](https://fathom.video/share/A6QFVpoxFzKg-6bd-H6LZsJRrPsopUfB?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
  - [Progression:](https://fathom.video/share/A6QFVpoxFzKg-6bd-H6LZsJRrPsopUfB?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
    1.  Overall impressions
    2.  Engagement (time on page, click-through rates)
    3.  Conversions (click-throughs to solution pages, case studies, capabilities pages)
    4.  Pipeline generation
  - [Grouped blogs into cohorts based on goals](https://fathom.video/share/A6QFVpoxFzKg-6bd-H6LZsJRrPsopUfB?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)
  - [4-week evaluation period for content performance](https://fathom.video/share/A6QFVpoxFzKg-6bd-H6LZsJRrPsopUfB?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)

### AI Impact on WebStacks

  - [Significant increase in traffic and conversions from AI sources](https://fathom.video/share/A6QFVpoxFzKg-6bd-H6LZsJRrPsopUfB?tab=summary&timestamp=1445.0)
  - [AI transparency in execution and client work differentiates WebStacks](https://fathom.video/share/A6QFVpoxFzKg-6bd-H6LZsJRrPsopUfB?tab=summary&timestamp=1521.0)
  - [Leveraging AI in internal workflows and client projects](https://fathom.video/share/A6QFVpoxFzKg-6bd-H6LZsJRrPsopUfB?tab=summary&timestamp=1530.0)
  - [Exploring programmatic content generation for long-tail topics](https://fathom.video/share/A6QFVpoxFzKg-6bd-H6LZsJRrPsopUfB?tab=summary&timestamp=1445.0)

### Future Collaboration Opportunities

  - [Potential for creating a website library/directory similar to Landbook](https://fathom.video/share/A6QFVpoxFzKg-6bd-H6LZsJRrPsopUfB?tab=summary&timestamp=2393.0)
  - [Exploring AI-driven content generation and classification systems](https://fathom.video/share/A6QFVpoxFzKg-6bd-H6LZsJRrPsopUfB?tab=summary&timestamp=2287.0)
  - [Possibility of building affiliate sites and tools](https://fathom.video/share/A6QFVpoxFzKg-6bd-H6LZsJRrPsopUfB?tab=summary&timestamp=2367.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule 1.5-hour deep dive session in July to explore collaborative AI-driven projects](https://fathom.video/share/A6QFVpoxFzKg-6bd-H6LZsJRrPsopUfB?tab=summary&timestamp=2287.0)
  - [Follow up with screenshots and data on traffic and AI referrals](https://fathom.video/share/A6QFVpoxFzKg-6bd-H6LZsJRrPsopUfB?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
  - [Explore potential for creating a WebStacks-specific website library/directory](https://fathom.video/share/A6QFVpoxFzKg-6bd-H6LZsJRrPsopUfB?tab=summary&timestamp=2393.0)
  - [Continue refining content strategy to achieve consistent, reliable results](https://fathom.video/share/A6QFVpoxFzKg-6bd-H6LZsJRrPsopUfB?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)
